# Python dependencies for PR Copilot utility scripts
# Install with: pip install -r requirements.txt

PyGithub>=2.1.1,<3.0.0
PyJWT>=2.13.0,<3.0.0  # CVE-2026-48526 / GHSA-xgmm-8j9v-c9wx; match runtime security floor
pyyaml>=6.0,<7.0
requests>=2.32.4,<3.0.0  # match runtime Guardrails security floor
